review_text: Enjoyed the Chole Bhature  Samosa (2 pcs)  Rasmalai (2 pcs)  and Tandoori Roti! Samosa (2 pcs) was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Incredible meal! Aloo Tikki Chaat  Naan  Kulfi  Paneer Tikka  and Butter Naan arrived hot and fresh. The Aloo Tikki Chaat was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!
Enjoyed the Naan! Naan was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Wow! Just wow! Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  Mango Lassi  Chicken Tikka Masala  and Aloo Tikki Chaat were all fantastic. Chicken Tikka Masala was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Hands down the best Rasmalai (2 pcs) I've ever had! Aloo Tikki Chaat  Lamb Rogan Josh  Gajar Halwa  and Rasmalai (2 pcs) were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Below expectations. Butter Chicken  Paneer Tikka  Butter Naan  and Lamb Rogan Josh were underwhelming. Butter Chicken was overcooked and dry.
Incredible meal! Dal Makhani  Mango Lassi  Fresh Lime Soda  Chicken Tikka Masala  and Gajar Halwa arrived hot and fresh. The Chicken Tikka Masala was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!
Very satisfied! Jeera Rice and Butter Naan were fresh and flavorful. Jeera Rice was the standout dish.
Hands down the best Jeera Rice I've ever had! Jeera Rice were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Great food overall. Chicken Seekh Kebab and Tandoori Roti were tasty  especially the Chicken Seekh Kebab. Would order again!

Outstanding experience! The Jeera Rice  Garlic Naan  and Fresh Lime Soda exceeded all expectations. Jeera Rice was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
Absolutely amazing Aloo Tikki Chaat! The Aloo Tikki Chaat was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Incredible meal! Chicken 65  Naan  and Aloo Tikki Chaat arrived hot and fresh. The Aloo Tikki Chaat was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!

Perfect in every way! Naan were all excellent. Naan stood out with its rich  authentic taste.
